privileged_info_summary: Task restructure_unformatted_leads contains three malformed Odoo CRM leads with data synthesized by setup_task.sh. The leads are identified by unique reference IDs in the description field (REF_LEAD_001, REF_LEAD_002, REF_LEAD_003). Lead 1 'Alice Wong - Q3 Software License' requires extracting contact name 'Alice Wong' and cleaning title to 'Q3 Software License'. Lead 2 'David Miller - Fleet Audit' requires extracting contact name 'David Miller' and cleaning title to 'Fleet Audit'. Lead 3 'URGENT: Elena Sisko - Security Breach Response' requires extracting contact name 'Elena Sisko', cleaning title to 'Security Breach Response', and setting priority to 3 (Very High). All metadata claims about expected contact names, titles, and priority values are verified against the setup scripts and task description.
